title: 100W USB C to USB C, Fast Charging Cable 3M Long Type C Cable C to C Charger Fast Charg Lead Usbc to Usbc for iPhone 16 15 Pro Max Plus MacBook iPad Pro/Air Samsung Galaxy S23/S22/S21 Google Pixel
features: ✅【USB C to USB C Cable】: This is a USBC to USBC cable not USB C to USB A cable, so it's important to note that you'll need a USB-C wall charger to charge your device.

✅【Get Your iPhone 15 Fastest Charging Speed】: Experience the next level of charging with our lightning-speed 100W USB-C to USB-C cable! With this usb c charger cable, your iPhone 15 series can reach a whopping 75% battery in just 30 minutes. Don't miss out on this charging revolution!

✅【Fast Charging & Data Transfer 2 in1】: This usb c fast charger cable supports PD100w high-speed charging and supports Huawei FCP, Qualcomm QC 3.0/4.0, and Samsung AFC protocols. It charges up to 50% faster than a regular 60w cable, so you can enjoy the security that a full charge gives you. Additionally, it has a data transfer speed of up to 480Mbps.

✅【SAFETY & QUALITY ASSURANCE CERTIFICATION】: This USB C to USB C cable is certified for electronic safety and has been tested in a lab environment on at least 2,000 different USB C type devices for optimal, smooth charging quality. The bionic flexible joints and advanced laser welding technology prevent the metal end of the joints from breaking.

✅【3M USBC Charger Cable】: ultra-long USB C fast charging cable with exclusively developed special wire to achieve stable charging without burning, effectively protect your device. Meanwhile the 3 metre length makes charging more convenient and improves the happiness index of your life!
✅【What You Get】 3m USB C to USB C cable*1 , user manual*1, 180 days money back, Aioneus industry-leading 18-months warranty and lifetime technical support.
description: Product Description 3m USB C to USB C Cable-Bring you a wonderful life experience 100% compatible with your iphone 15 and macbook!
